title: sphalanthus sulcatus
intro: Sphalanthus sulcatus, also known as the cut-leaved Sphalanthus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphalanthus sulcatus include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Sphalanthus sulcatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and it is also used in some traditional remedies as a topical application.
